title: ulex europaeus f. humilior
intro: Ulex europaeus f. humilior, also known as dwarf gorse, is a compact and flowering variant of the Ulex europaeus shrub. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The dwarf gorse has been found to have various health benefits, such as aiding in the reduction of fever and alleviating respiratory issues, due to its expectorant and antitussive properties. It is often used in herbal preparations like teas, infusions, and tinctures, where it is combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects and promote overall well-being.
